D8 = К155РЕ3, the 0x4000-0xBFFF window decoder (DECODED from firmware .117 + the RomBios P-command window doc): A0-A4 = BA11-BA15 [firmware-derived], D3..D0 = active-low 8K bank selects (4000/6000/8000/A000), D4-D7 asserted across the window; feeds D9 (EPROM pair CS + CS4-7). Table .117 live in re3_prom.
sheet-1: РТ4 D2 = bus-arbitration/wait PROM (A <- VIDEO CYCLE/-XACK/-WREQ rails, DO=12); nets deferred; contents = ДГШ5.106.037 [dump pending]; drawing = .037 per the official .009 BOM
